description:
Relocate agent-template tree from packages/pi-workflows/templates/ to packages/pi-jit-agents/templates/; add 6 missing whole-block delegators (render_decisions, render_features, render_framework_gaps, render_layer_plans, render_research, render_spec_reviews) at the new canonical location; extend CANONICAL_MACRO_NAMES registry to carry array_key column per 3-divergent-kind handling (framework-gaps→gaps, layer-plans→plans, spec-reviews→reviews); rewire 5 consumer call-sites in pi-workflows from bundledDir(templates) to bundledTemplateDir from pi-jit-agents; drop templates/ from pi-workflows package.json files array; add templates/ to pi-jit-agents package.json files array. Closes FGAP-037 via supersession edge gap_superseded_by_task. Implements one phase of FEAT-001 consumer cascade per DEC-0049 uniform-agent axiom; sibling to TASK-082 (pi-workflows duplicate AgentSpec deletion) and TASK-083 (pi-behavior-monitors consumer cascade); does not depend on either since the template-tree relocation is independent of the duplicate-loader deletion.

**Closing citation (Step 13c of plan ~/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md, 2026-05-29T14:14:32.161Z):** branch `feat-001-template-relocation`; HEAD prior to this mutation `1ac83bcd4099656307877c4075b2f57841babf27` (12+ commits ahead of main parent 6df6e84); runtime demo at `scripts/orchestrator/runtime-demo-whole-block-delegators.ts` (exit 0; 918553 chars rendered across 8155 lines per Step 11 commit 554c3df); adversarial probe at `/tmp/fgap-037-adversarial-probe.md` (4/4 PASS across Lens 1-4); attested by VER-065 (filed Step 13d). Supersession edge to FGAP-037 via gap_superseded_by_task appended Step 13e. completed_by=human:davidryan@gmail.com via auth-gate confirm; completed_at=2026-05-29T14:14:32.161Z.
acceptance_criteria: All template files (14 per-item macros in items/ + shared/macros.md + shared/render-helpers.md) relocated via git mv with history preserved (git log --follow traces every file across the move).

6 whole-block delegators (render_decisions, render_features, render_framework_gaps, render_layer_plans, render_research, render_spec_reviews) landed in packages/pi-jit-agents/templates/shared/macros.md, each importing the per-item macro from items/<kind>.md and delegating through render_whole_block_truthy with correct array_key handling (gaps/plans/reviews divergence honored).

CANONICAL_MACRO_NAMES registry at packages/pi-jit-agents/src/renderer-registry.ts extended from Record<string,string> to Record<string,{macro_name,array_key}> carrying all 14 block_kind entries with array_key values matching packages/pi-context/samples/conception.json verbatim.
All readers of CANONICAL_MACRO_NAMES across the codebase updated from string-access to .macro_name property access.

5 pi-workflows consumer call-sites (template.ts, render-by-id.ts, workflow-sdk.ts, test-helpers.ts, template-validation.ts) rewired from bundledDir(templates) to bundledTemplateDir imported from @davidorex/pi-jit-agents/template; bundledDir(templates) branch dropped from packages/pi-workflows/src/bundled-dirs.ts.
packages/pi-workflows/package.json drops templates/ from files array; packages/pi-jit-agents/package.json adds templates/ to files array and exposes ./template export subpath.

New macros.test.ts at packages/pi-jit-agents/src/ exercises all 6 new whole-block delegators against real .project/<file>.json data; each test asserts non-empty output + presence of display-name header + presence of first 1-2 item IDs + absence of [object Object] + absence of undefined substrings.

Extended renderer-registry.test.ts asserts CANONICAL_MACRO_NAMES carries array_key for all 14 entries with values matching conception.json verbatim for the 3 divergent kinds + at least 3 same-as-block-kind entries.
npm run build + npm run check + npm test all green workspace-wide; SKILL.md regenerated; citation-rot scanner clean across all 5 packages.

Adversarial probe runs 4 lenses (relocation completeness / consumer rewire correctness / 6 delegators + array-key registry / rendering smoke against real substrate); 4/4 PASS; status cascade complete (FGAP-037 status=superseded_by + closed_by/closed_at + relations.json supersession edge appended; DEC-0049 6th consequence appended; new VER attests TASK completion + verification_verifies_item edge appended; HANDOFF.md current-position refreshed).
notes: Created under FEAT-001 (consumer cascade) per canonical-resolution analysis at analysis/2026-05-29-fgap-037-canonical-resolution.md. Supersedes FGAP-037 (whose body claimed per-item macros missing — false; per-item macros at packages/pi-workflows/templates/items/ exist and work; the actual gap was the 6 whole-block delegators + the array-key registry column). Branch: feat-001-template-relocation. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md.
